colombia.adviceLabel: Exercise a high degree of caution
colombia.summary: We advise: Exercise a high degree of caution in Colombia overall due to the threat of violent crime and terrorism. Higher levels apply in some areas.
regionalAdvisories: Exercise a high degree of caution Exercise a high degree of caution in Colombia overall due to the threat of violent crime and terrorism., Do not travel Do not travel to: areas within 20km of the Venezuela border; areas within 20km of the Ecuador border (except the Pan American Highway border crossing of Ipiales). the Catatumbo region in Norte de Santander and Cesar; the department of Cauca, except Popayán and the Pan American Highway; the cities of Buenaventura and Tumaco; the Darién Gap (except the town of Capurganá) due to the high risk of terrorism, violent crime and criminal activity. See 'Safety', Reconsider your need to travel Reconsider your need to travel to: Antioquia (except Medellin and its Valle de Aburrá metropolitan region; the south-eastern Oriente subregion; and the towns around Medellin of Santa Fé de Antioquia, Jericó and Jardín) within 20km of the border with Brazil and Peru in Amazonas (except for the area south of the Putumayo River). Arauca southern Bolivar Caquetá (except Florencia) Casanare (except Yopal) the Sur subregion of Cesar Chocó (except the towns of Bahía Solano, Capurganá, Nuquí and Quibdo) the Alto Sinú and San Jorge subregions of Córdoba Guainía Guaviare Ipiales Meta (except Villavicencio and the tourist site of La Macarena/Caño Cristales) Nariño (except Pasto) Norte de Santander Putumayo Quibdo the San Jorge and La Mojana subregions of Sucre Valle del Cauca (except Cali, Buga and Palmira) within 20km of the border with Brazil in Vaupés Vichada due to the high threat of terrorism and criminal activity. See Safety

egypt.adviceLabel: Exercise a high degree of caution

regionalAdvisories: Exercise a high degree of caution Exercise a high degree of caution in Egypt overall due to the threat of terrorism, including to the following areas: Cairo and the Nile Delta area, including Qena, Luxor and the Valley of the Kings, Aswan and Abu Simbel the coastal areas between the Nile Delta and Marsa Matrouh Siwa via the Marsa Matrouh-Siwa Road the road from Giza to Farafra, including the areas of Bahariya, the Black Desert and White Desert and Farafra the Port Said Governorate the Ahmed Hamdi Tunnel Road (M50) west of the North Sinai Governorate Sharm el Sheikh., Do not travel Do not travel to: the Governorate of North Sinai, including the Taba-Suez Road, or within 40km of Egypt's border with Libya due to the high threat of terrorist attack and serious crime, including kidnapping the Bir Tawil Trapezoid (between Egypt and Sudan, which is not claimed by either country), Reconsider your need to travel Reconsider your need to travel to the following locations due to the threat of terrorism: the South Sinai Governorate except for the southern coastal area of Sharm el Sheikh which is listed under ‘Exercise a high degree of caution’ the Ismailiyah Governorate east of the Suez Canal West of the Nile Valley and Nile Delta regions except for the areas listed under ‘Exercise a high degree of caution’ the Haila’ib Triangle and within 20km of the southern border with Sudan

tunisia.adviceLabel: Exercise a high degree of caution
tunisia.summary: We advise: Exercise a high degree of caution in Tunisia overall due to the threat of terrorism. Higher levels apply in some areas.
regionalAdvisories: Exercise a high degree of caution Exercise a high degree of caution in Tunisia overall due to the threat of terrorism., Do not travel Do not travel to the following locations, due to ongoing security forces operations and the high threat of terrorist attack and kidnapping: • within 20kms of the Algerian border (except for the P7 highway to/from the Malloula border crossing and the towns of Ain Draham, Tamerza, Mides, Chebika and Tabarka, where we advise exercise a high degree of caution).• within 30kms of the Libyan border• the Governorate of Kasserine• the mountain ranges and surrounding forests of Mount Chaambi, Mount Mghila (which extends to the governorate of Sidi Bouzid), Mount Sammama and Mount Selloum• the cordoned off military zone south of the town of Remada in the governorate of Tataouine., Reconsider your need to travel Reconsider your need to travel to the following locations due to the presence of a military zone, the risk of terrorism, and limited mobile coverage: • the Delegation of Remada • Mount Orbata.

turkey.adviceLabel: Exercise a high degree of caution
turkey.summary: We advise: Exercise a high degree of caution in Türkiye overall due to the threat of terrorism. Higher levels apply.
regionalAdvisories: Exercise a high degree of caution Exercise a high degree of caution in Türkiye overall due to the threat of terrorism., Do not travel Do not travel to within 10km of the border with Syria due to serious threat of terrorism, violence and acts of war in this area., Reconsider your need to travel Reconsider your need to travel to the provinces of Hakkari and Sirnak due to the unpredictable security situation.

turkmenistan.adviceLabel: Exercise a high degree of caution
turkmenistan.summary: We advise: Exercise a high degree of caution in Turkmenistan overall due to the threat of crime. Higher levels apply in some areas.
regionalAdvisories: Exercise a high degree of caution to Turkmenistan overall. Exercise a high degree of caution to Turkmenistan overall due to the threat of crime., Do not travel to the region bordering Afghanistan. Do not travel to the region bordering Afghanistan due to political and civil unrest and the high threat of violence. See Safety.

uganda.adviceLabel: Exercise a high degree of caution
uganda.summary: We advise: Exercise a high degree of caution in Uganda overall due to the threat of terrorism and violent crime, and the risk of civil unrest. Higher levels apply in some areas.
regionalAdvisories: Exercise a high degree of caution Exercise a high degree of caution in Uganda overall due to the threat of terrorism and violent crime, and the risk of civil unrest., Do not travel Do not travel within 50 kilometres of the border with South Sudan due to the serious risk of armed bandits and cross-border attacks by rebel groups., Reconsider your need to travel Reconsider your need to travel within 50 kilometres of the border with the Democratic Republic of the Congo due to the risk of banditry and attacks by armed groups. This includes areas North and South of Lake Albert. We advise exercise a high degree of caution to the Eastern shores of Lake Albert.

ukraine.summary: We continue to advise: Do not travel to Ukraine due to the volatile security environment and military conflict.
regionalAdvisories: Do not travel Do not travel to Ukraine, including Crimea and the regions of Donetsk and Luhansk, due to the volatile security environment and military conflict.

united arab emirates.summary: We advise: Do not travel to the UAE due to the volatile security situation in the region.
regionalAdvisories: Do not travel Do not travel to the United Arab Emirates due to the volatile security situation in the region.

united kingdom.adviceLabel: Exercise a high degree of caution
united kingdom.summary: We advise: Exercise a high degree of caution in the UK due to the threat of terrorism.
regionalAdvisories: Exercise a high degree of caution Exercise a high degree of caution in the UK due to the threat of terrorism.

united states of america.summary: We advise: Exercise normal safety precautions in the United States of America.
regionalAdvisories: Exercise normal safety precautions Exercise normal safety precautions in the United States of America.

uruguay.summary: We advise: Exercise normal safety precautions in Uruguay.
regionalAdvisories: Exercise normal safety precautions in Uruguay. Exercise normal safety precautions in Uruguay.

uzbekistan.adviceLabel: Exercise a high degree of caution
uzbekistan.summary: We advise: Exercise a high degree of caution in Uzbekistan overall due to the threat of terrorism and violent crime and the risk of civil unrest. Higher levels apply in some areas.
regionalAdvisories: Exercise a high degree of caution in Uzbekistan overall. Exercise a high degree of caution in Uzbekistan overall due to the threat of terrorism and violent crime and the risk of civil unrest., Do not travel to the border region with Afghanistan. Do not travel to the border region with Afghanistan due to the volatile security situation., Reconsider your need to travel to Andijan, eastern region of the Ferghana Valley, other regions bordering Tajikistan and the Kyrgyz Republic. Reconsider your need to travel to: Andijan eastern region of the Ferghana Valley other regions bordering Tajikistan and the Kyrgyz Republic. The security situation is volatile due to regional political tension and conflict, and there's a risk of violent protests and unmarked landmines.

vanuatu.summary: We advise: Exercise normal safety precautions in Vanuatu.
regionalAdvisories: Exercise normal safety precautions in Vanuatu. Exercise normal safety precautions in Vanuatu.

venezuela.summary: We continue to advise: Do not travel to Venezuela due to the dangerous security situation, the threat of violent crime, political and economic instability and risk of arbitrary detention.
regionalAdvisories: Do not travel to Venezuela. Do not travel to Venezuela due to the dangerous security situation, the threat of violent crime, political and economic instability and risk of arbitrary detention.

vietnam.summary: We advise:Exercise normal safety precautions in Vietnam.
regionalAdvisories: Exercise normal safety precautions in Vietnam. Exercise normal safety precautions in Vietnam.

yemen.summary: We continue to advise: Do not travel to Yemen (including the island of Socotra) due to the dangerous security situation and the threat of armed conflict, kidnapping and terrorism.
regionalAdvisories: Do not travel Do not travel to Yemen (including the island of Socotra) due to the dangerous security situation and the threat of armed conflict, kidnapping and terrorism.

zambia.summary: We advise: Exercise normal safety precautions in Zambia overall. Higher levels apply in some areas.
regionalAdvisories: Exercise normal safety precautions Exercise normal safety precautions in Zambia overall., Exercise a high degree of caution Exercise a high degree of caution along border areas with the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC) due to the threat of armed criminal gangs and unexploded landmines.

zimbabwe.adviceLabel: Exercise a high degree of caution
zimbabwe.summary: We advise: Exercise a high degree of caution in Zimbabwe due to the threat of crime and the risk of civil unrest.
regionalAdvisories: Exercise a high degree of caution Exercise a high degree of caution in Zimbabwe due to the threat of crime and the risk of civil unrest.
